title: Simple Weapons
description: Currently adds two new weapons: the pilum, and the gladius. Will add more soon.
body:
Simple Weapons is a mod that adds these weapons:


<details>
<summary>Pilum</summary>

Craftable tiers: Iron, Diamond, Netherite

Highest Tier Melee Attack Damage: 8

Highest Tier Melee Attack Speed: 1.3

Notes:

You can right click to throw the pilum. When it lands, it will break, just like it does in real life. The highest tier does is: 47.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Gladius</summary>
Craftable Tiers: Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite

Highest Melee Attack Damage: 8.5

Highest Melee Attack Speed: 1.7

Notes:
Just a strong, fast sword. 
</details>


Can be compatable with Epic Fight using this datapack: [EF Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/songfuls-epic-fight-datapack) Requires version 0.0.5 or higher.

Feel free to make a video on this mod

Made by SongfulTulip. Made with Mcreator
